I noticed your profile and thought you might be a great fit for a role we have open. We're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer at TechFlow Inc. to build and maintain distributed data pipelines using Python and AWS.

The role is remote (US), pays $150k-$190k, and you'd join a small team of 8 engineers at our Series B startup. Stack: Python, PostgreSQL, AWS Lambda, Docker.

Would love to chat if you're interested!

Best,
Sarah Chen
